name: Ozone Park Boys
description: The Ozone Park Boys are a Gambino crime family Mafia crew based in Ozone Park, Queens, New York City. Founded in the 1980s, they are known for a wide range of criminal activities including a $30 million-a-year sports gambling enterprise, auto theft, murder, and drug trafficking. The crew operated under Ronald Trucchio during the 1990s and remains active.
